title: assistant-tdd Skill Behavior Eval Fixtures
description: Provider-neutral offline eval cases for the assistant-tdd skill's Red-Green-Refactor enforcement.
recommended_use: Run each case with the assistant-tdd skill instructions loaded.
Compare the local response against RED, GREEN, REFACTOR gate behavior and required RED evidence.
Use deterministic substring checks as offline proxies for contract adherence, not semantic grading.

cases.title: Bugfix starts with RED evidence
cases.purpose: Checks that a bug fix begins with one failing test, verifies the right failure reason, and blocks production code until RED evidence exists.
cases.prompt: Use TDD to fix the bug where the skill eval runner accepts duplicate case ids.
setup_context: The assistant-tdd skill instructions are active.
No failing regression test has been written yet.
expected_behavior: Activates Red-Green-Refactor and records TDD as active.
Starts with RED by writing exactly one failing behavior test.
Runs the test and verifies that it fails for the right reason.
Captures RED evidence including test file, test name, command run, failure summary, and why it proves the missing behavior.
Blocks production implementation until the failing test evidence exists.
Does not batch multiple unrelated behaviors into the first RED step.
pass_criteria: The response names RED as the first phase.
The response requires one failing test before production code.
The response requires the failure to be for the right reason.
The response lists the RED evidence needed before GREEN.
The response refuses to write production code before RED evidence.
fail_signals: Writes several behavior tests in one RED cycle.
Treats a syntax error or missing import as a valid RED failure.
Promises to add tests after fixing the bug.

forbidden_substrings: I will fix the code first

cases.title: GREEN and REFACTOR run all tests
cases.purpose: Checks that GREEN implements the simplest code, then runs targeted and full tests, and that REFACTOR remains behavior-neutral with all tests green.
cases.prompt: The RED test is failing for the expected missing duplicate-id validation. Continue the TDD cycle.
setup_context: The assistant-tdd skill instructions are active.
A valid RED test has already failed for the intended missing behavior.
Production implementation has not yet started.
expected_behavior: Moves to GREEN only because RED evidence is present.
Implements the simplest production change needed to pass the failing test.
Runs the previously failing test and confirms it now passes.
Runs all other tests to detect regressions.
Uses REFACTOR only for behavior-neutral cleanup.
Runs all tests again after REFACTOR and starts the next behavior with a new RED cycle.
pass_criteria: The response gates GREEN on prior RED evidence.
The response limits implementation to the simplest passing code.
The response runs targeted and all tests in GREEN.
The response runs all tests after REFACTOR.
fail_signals: Skips the full regression suite after GREEN.
Starts the next behavior without a new RED cycle.
